description: Rebrand all agent framework references from hermes to arachne throughout the codebase. Mechanical rename only — no logic changes, no refactoring, no new features.

userStories.title: Audit and rename all hermes-named directories and files
userStories.description: As a developer, I need all directories and files with 'hermes' in their names renamed to use 'arachne' equivalents, so the filesystem reflects the new brand.
acceptanceCriteria: Run the audit commands from the spec and save output to _rename_manifest.txt
Confirm no .git/ or submodule paths appear in the manifest
Identify and record all model name strings (Hermes-3, Hermes-2, etc.) for later protection

Rename all directories containing 'hermes' (deepest first): hermes_agent→arachne, hermes_cli→arachne_cli, hermes_constants→arachne_constants, hermes_state→arachne_state, hermes_tools→arachne_tools, etc.
Rename all files containing 'hermes': setup-hermes.sh→setup-arachne.sh, etc.
Verification: find for hermes-named dirs returns empty (excl .git, submodules)
Verification: find for hermes-named files returns empty (excl .git, submodules)
userStories.notes: Do NOT touch .git/, mini-swe-agent/, tinker-atropos/. Apply naming rules table exactly. Process deepest paths first to avoid breaking child paths.

userStories.title: Replace compound forms and module-level names in file content
userStories.description: As a developer, I need all compound hermes references (hermes-agent, hermes_agent) and module names (hermes_cli, hermes_constants, hermes_state, hermes_tools) replaced in file content.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace hermes-agent → arachne in all in-scope file types
Replace hermes_agent → arachne in all in-scope file types
Preserve hermes-agent in https://github.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent URLs
Replace hermes_cli → arachne_cli in all in-scope file types
Replace hermes_constants → arachne_constants in all in-scope file types
Replace hermes_state → arachne_state in all in-scope file types
Replace hermes_tools → arachne_tools in all in-scope file types
Verification: grep for hermes-agent|hermes_agent returns empty (excl external URLs)
Verification: grep for hermes_cli|hermes_constants|hermes_state|hermes_tools returns empty
userStories.notes: In-scope file types: .py .ts .js .sh .ps1 .md .txt .toml .yaml .yml .json .cfg .env .example .ini. Do NOT edit .gitmodules, lock files, binary files, image files. Exclude .git/, mini-swe-agent/, tinker-atropos/.

userStories.title: Replace class names, env var prefix, and config path in content
userStories.description: As a developer, I need all CamelCase class names, the HERMES_ env var prefix, and ~/.hermes config paths updated to their arachne equivalents.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace HermesAgent → ArachneAgent in all in-scope file types
Replace HermesCLI → ArachneCLI in all in-scope file types
Replace HermesState → ArachneState in all in-scope file types
Replace HermesConstants → ArachneConstants in all in-scope file types
Replace HERMES_ → ARACHNE_ (env var prefix) in all in-scope file types
Replace ~/.hermes → ~/.arachne in all in-scope file types
Verification: grep for HermesAgent|HermesCLI|HermesState|HermesConstants returns empty
Verification: grep for HERMES_ returns empty
Verification: grep for ~/.hermes returns empty
userStories.notes: Case-sensitive replacements. Same file type scope and exclusions as US-002.

userStories.title: Replace standalone hermes/Hermes with model name protection
userStories.description: As a developer, I need all remaining standalone 'hermes' (lowercase) and 'Hermes' (title case) replaced with 'arachne'/'Arachne', while preserving all NousResearch model name strings.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace standalone lowercase hermes → arachne across all in-scope files
Replace standalone title-case Hermes → Arachne across all in-scope files
Preserve all NousResearch model name strings (e.g. NousResearch/Hermes-3-Llama-3.1-8B) — these must NOT be renamed
Preserve hermes in external URLs (e.g. https://github.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent)
After replacement, verify no corrupted model strings exist: grep for NousResearch/arachne, arachne-3, arachne-2, NousResearch/Arachne, Arachne-3, Arachne-2
If any corrupted model strings found, restore them to original form
Verification: corrupted model string grep returns empty after restoration
userStories.notes: This is the broadest and most delicate pass. Model name patterns: NousResearch/Hermes-*, Hermes-3, Hermes-2. These must be preserved exactly. Check the model name list from _rename_manifest.txt (recorded in US-001).

userStories.title: Update package metadata, install scripts, and replace README
userStories.description: As a developer, I need pyproject.toml, package.json, install scripts, and README.md updated to reflect the arachne brand.
acceptanceCriteria: pyproject.toml: name → arachne, description → 'Persistent agent layer for the Spiderweb system. Forked from NousResearch/hermes-agent.', entrypoint hermes → arachne
package.json: name → arachne, description updated, bin entry hermes → arachne if present
setup.py/setup.cfg: same changes if files exist
scripts/install.sh: ~/.local/bin/hermes → ~/.local/bin/arachne, ~/.hermes/hermes-agent → ~/.arachne/arachne, all other hermes paths
scripts/install.ps1: same path replacements
setup-arachne.sh: confirm all internal references now use arachne
Replace README.md content with the Arachne README from arachne-README.md (copy verbatim)
Verification: README.md first line reads '# Arachne'
Verification: grep -n hermes in install scripts returns empty (except upstream attribution)
userStories.notes: The arachne-README.md file in the project root contains the verbatim README content. Copy it to README.md and then delete arachne-README.md.

userStories.title: Final sweep, cleanup manifest, and commit
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a final broad grep to catch any missed hermes references, cleanup of working files, and a clean git commit.
acceptanceCriteria: Run final sweep: grep -rn '\bhermes\b' with all in-scope extensions, -i flag, excluding .git/, submodules, NousResearch/Hermes model strings, and hermes-agent GitHub URLs
If any output returned, inspect each line, apply naming rules, make replacement, re-run until empty
Delete _rename_manifest.txt
git add -A && git commit with message: 'chore: rename hermes → arachne throughout'
Verification: final sweep returns empty output
Verification: git status is clean
Verification: git log --oneline -1 shows the rebrand commit
userStories.notes:
Commit message body: 'Fork of NousResearch/hermes-agent.
All agent framework references renamed to Arachne.
Upstream model name strings (NousResearch/Hermes-*) preserved unchanged.
Submodules (mini-swe-agent, tinker-atropos) untouched.'
